articles.title: Public-Private Partnerships key to transforming Harare City Council into a smart city

articles.title: Zimbabwe opposition groups fight against proposed constitutional change
articles.description: The proposed amendments would extend the presidential term from five to seven years and replace direct presidential elections with a vote by lawmakers.

articles.title: Beijing tells Chinese firms to strengthen Zimbabwe risk prevention after mineral export ban
articles.description: China's government on Thursday told Chinese businesses operating in Zimbabwe to "strenghthen risk prevention and compliance awareness" after the country suspended ​exports of raw minerals and lithium concentrates.

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: The Farm Eviction Scandal: Why a Former Minister Was Kicked Out of a 40-Hectare ‘Gift’
more.description: When the High Court ordered a former Minister to vacate a 40-hectare farm within seven days, branding her “duplicitous,” it opened a Pandora’s Box of the “Land Reform’s” dirty secrets. more.title: French State Pirates detains Mozambique-flagged oil tanker en route from Russia
more.description: PARIS,- French authorities have detained the Mozambique-flagged tanker Denya, which was sailing from Murmansk, the Mediterranean maritime prefecture said. “On March 20, 2026, the French Navy conducted an offshore operation in the western part of the Mediterranean, against the Denya oil tanker, which was sailing from Murmansk under the flag of Mozambique,” it said on [...] The post French State Pirates detains Mozambique-flagged oil tanker en route from Russia appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: ITC, ZimTrade launch SheTrades Zimbabwe Hub, marking eighth Hub in Africa
more.description: (Harare/Geneva) – At a time of major shifts in global trade, more women‐led businesses across Zimbabwe are set to earn increased incomes, with the launch of a resource centre by the International Trade Centre (ITC) and ZimTrade, dedicated to supporting local women entrepreneurs to gain skills, networks and market access.

more.title: Is the Zimbabwean government’s reluctance to scrap high fuel taxes designed to benefit the Zvigananda?
more.description: In Zimbabwe, the self-interest of the powerful always comes first.

more.description: HAWAII, United States – Chuck Norris, the martial arts grandmaster and action star whose roles in “Walker, Texas Ranger” and other television shows and movies made him an iconic tough guy – sparking internet parodies and adoration from presidents – has died at 86. more.description: A two-week dental outreach led by Cimas Health Group in partnership with the United Kingdom-based charity SmileStar has brought free oral healthcare services to hundreds of patients across Matabeleland North and South, underscoring the growing role of partnerships in expanding access to care.
